name: comparison_sort_lower_bound
subject: comparison_sort
theorem_src: theorem comparison_sort_lower_bound : forall n h : Nat, 2 ^ h >= Nat.factorial n -> h >= Nat.log 2 (Nat.factorial n)

name: additive_identity
subject: nat_add
theorem_src: theorem additive_identity : forall n : Nat, n + 0 = n

name: mul_comm_nat
subject: nat_mul
theorem_src: theorem mul_comm_nat : forall a b : Nat, a * b = b * a
